caption: A man wearing a red hooded sweatshirt and a black baseball cap is filmed outdoors in a parking lot area near a road. Initially, the view is from a low angle, showing a grey car and a stretch of road under a blue sky with clouds. The scene then shifts to a close-up of the man, who is speaking while standing beside a silver car. He continues to speak, his facial expressions changing as he looks toward the camera. In the background, there are white buildings with blue roofs, green trees, and some orange traffic cones. A silver car is parked behind him, and a white vehicle is partially visible to the side. The lighting is bright, suggesting daytime, and the man remains the central focus of the latter part of the sequence.
